summary: Verified the four final-release bug fixes for the eFootball Turkish league/cup manager. Backend: 7/7 pytest cases pass for PUT /api/auth/me (username update returns new token, password update, <3-char rejection, duplicate rejection) and DELETE /api/admin/tournament while in cup mode (deletes tournament + cleans matches). A full cup flow test using POST start->result with a drawn-score + pen_winner_team_id correctly advances winners and sets champion + finished status. Frontend: Confirmed the main 'delete cup on phones' bug is fixed - the new ConfirmDialog (data-testid=confirm-dialog) appears instead of native window.confirm, and clicking confirm-accept-btn actually deletes the cup tournament and UI returns to 'Yeni Başlat'. ProfileDialog opens from profile-menu-btn for admin and shows only the Account section; profile-save-account-btn saves and shows a sonner toast (with close button). No JS console errors observed.

minor.issue: Pre-existing regression test file /app/backend/tests/test_cup_and_league.py is stale: result endpoint now requires a prior call to /api/admin/cup/match/{id}/start (returns 400 'Önce maçı başlatın'). 9 tests in that legacy file fail. The new test_profile_and_delete_cup.py covers the correct flow.

action_items: (Optional) Update legacy /app/backend/tests/test_cup_and_league.py to call POST /api/admin/cup/match/{id}/start before /result, OR delete it in favor of the new test_profile_and_delete_cup.py which already covers cup creation, draw, start->result, draw+penalty winner, advance, champion, delete-with-matches-cleanup. 9 stale regression tests currently fail because of the missing start call.
(Optional) Add an automated mobile-width (390px) layout assertion for CupBracket overflow once a cup with drawn teams is seeded by tests - not verified this round.
(Optional) Add automated regression for sonner Toaster closeButton + 3.5s duration on the squad-save flow - not verified this round (requires a regular user with a team).
critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py is 1179 lines (>700) - consider splitting by domain (auth, teams, tournament, cup, matches, notifications) into routers.

PUT /api/auth/me does not require current password to change password - this is per the product spec ('Password change requires NO current-password verification'), but is a security trade-off worth documenting in the README.

DELETE /api/admin/tournament only deletes the active tournament. If multiple non-active tournaments exist they could orphan. Currently mitigated because active_tournament() returns the running one; still, consider hard-deleting by id for explicitness.
ProfileUpdateReq username==empty-string is silently ignored (no error). Acceptable but UI should disable Save when no changes (currently shows 'Değişiklik yok' toast which is fine).

success_rate.frontend: 100% on the verified flows (delete-cup + profile dialog open/save)

seed_data_creation: test_profile_and_delete_cup.py creates ephemeral users (TEST_prof_*, TEST_pw_*, TEST_dup1_*, TEST_du_*, TEST_fc_*) and teams (TEST_DTeam_*, TEST_FCT_*); clean_env fixture wipes them before/after each test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All four reported final-release fixes verified at the backend layer (pytest) and the main delete-cup UI bug verified end-to-end via Playwright. ProfileDialog open + admin account-save flow verified. NOT verified in UI this round: (a) ProfileDialog 'Hesap'+'Takım & TD' two-tab view for a regular user with a team (need to register a user and create a team via UI first), (b) CupBracket no-horizontal-overflow at 390px on dashboard (cup was deleted, would need to recreate cup + register 2+ users with teams + admin draw), (c) sonner Toaster closeButton + 3.5s on save-squad flow. If retesting, use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. data-testids found in DOM: profile-menu-btn, profile-dialog, profile-account-section, profile-username-input, profile-password-input, profile-toggle-pass, profile-save-account-btn, confirm-dialog, confirm-accept-btn, confirm-cancel-btn, delete-tournament-btn, mode-cup-btn, start-tournament-btn, tournament-name-input.
rca of the issue: Original bug: tapping 'Tamamen Sil' on a mobile PWA did nothing because the click handler called native window.confirm() which is unreliable / suppressed in some mobile PWAs (especially when display-mode is standalone). Fix replaced window.confirm() with a Promise-based ConfirmProvider (src/components/ConfirmProvider.jsx) rendering a real modal dialog with explicit accept/cancel buttons. Verified end-to-end: clicking delete-tournament-btn opens [data-testid=confirm-dialog], then clicking [data-testid=confirm-accept-btn] calls DELETE /api/admin/tournament which returns {deleted:true} and the UI returns to the 'Yeni Başlat' (no active tournament) state. The fix also works for cup-mode tournaments and cleans related matches (verified server-side via test_delete_cup_with_matches_clears_matches).
